pi_items.metadata_value: Gorgolewski et al. (2017). Scientific Data. doi:10.1038/sdata.2017.93
pi_items.source: Crossref API search. doi:10.1038/sdata.2017.93 actually points to Alberti et al. 'Viral to metazoan marine plankton...'. The true citation for CNP is Poldrack et al. (2016) doi:10.1038/sdata.2016.110.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 11 real participants from the CNP OpenNeuro ds000030 dataset, plus one synthetically injected participant (sub-99999). Python analysis confirms that sub-99999 exhibits physiologically impossible GO RTs (between 15.1ms and 25.0ms) and a 100% SuccessfulStop rate. Recalculation of the integration method SSRT yields a group mean of ~247.4 ms for the 11 real participants. The metadata citation 'doi:10.1038/sdata.2017.93' is completely fabricated/contradicted as it points to an unrelated marine biology paper by Alberti et al.; the correct CNP dataset citation is Poldrack et al. (2016) doi:10.1038/sdata.2016.110.
